description_long: This is a round wall clock with a metallic gray frame and a white face. The clock features bold black Arabic numerals marking each hour, with a red second hand and black hour and minute hands. The outer edge of the face is bordered by a thin red ring, adding a subtle accent to the otherwise monochrome design. The casing appears to be made of metal, giving it a sturdy and slightly industrial look, with some visible wear and surface texture. The back of the clock is smooth and featureless, while the sides are thin and consistent in width. This clock is designed to be easily readable from a distance, making it suitable for public or communal spaces.
description: A round wall clock with a metallic gray frame, white face, bold black numerals, and red accent ring. It features black hour and minute hands and a red second hand.
description_view_0: A side view showing the thin, metallic gray frame of the clock with no visible face details.
description_view_1: The front view displays the white clock face, bold black Arabic numerals, black hour and minute hands, and a red second hand with a red accent ring.
description_view_2: Another side view, identical to view 0, showing the slim profile of the metallic frame.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a smooth, featureless metallic surface with no visible markings or mechanisms.
attribute_face_design: Circular white face with bold black Arabic numerals, a thin red accent ring, and three central hands.
